section.heading: Depot-level activities of the Department of Defense: authority to compete for maintenance and repair workloads of other Federal agencies

content.p: A depot-level activity of the Department of Defense shall be eligible to compete for the performance of any depot-level maintenance and repair workload of a Federal agency for which competitive procedures are used to select the entity to perform the workload.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title III, § 335(a), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2716.)
